title: enum4linux / enum4linux-ng SMB Domain Sweep
description: This runbook operationalizes enum4linux / enum4linux-ng SMB Domain Sweep using #enum4linux , #enum4linux-ng.py , #enum4linux-ng . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Rapid unauthenticated SMB/domain recon for users, shares, and policy indicators.

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes enum4linux / enum4linux-ng SMB Domain Sweep using #enum4linux , #enum4linux-ng.py , #enum4linux-ng. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Rapid unauthenticated SMB/domain recon for users, shares, and policy indicators.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/hackmd-oscp-pen200.md:85; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Attack Common Services.md:22.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 445.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

enum4linux -a {IP}
./enum4linux-ng.py 10.10.11.45 -A -C
enum4linux-ng -A <RHOST>
extraInfo: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md ; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/hackmd-oscp-pen200.md:85; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Attack Common Services.md:22 .
